data.rag_results_preview:
["Welcome to ACME Corporation! We're excited to have you join our team.
This handbook contains important information about company policies, benefits, and procedures.
Your manager will schedule a meet-and-greet with your team within your first week.", 'IT Support is available Monday-Friday, 9 AM - 6 PM EST.
Password resets: Use the self-service portal at password.acme.internal
Hardware requests: Submit a ticket through ServiceNow
Emergency IT issues: Call the 24/7 hotline at ext. 5555', 'AI
data.response_preview:
Hello, I'd be happy to assist you with your questions or concerns. I can provide information on various topics, including customer lookup, send email, database query, file manager, payment processor, and AI assistant configuration.
